verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come as you are' Come and drink from the Living waters That flowed from His hands Flowed from His side.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come as you are Come and bathe in the healing water Cleansing from sin Releasing new life.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Draw near to Him And He'll draw near to you He's been waiting for You to call on His Name So come, come as you are
